## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests locally
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when behavior changed
- [ ] I checked that public-facing copy does not include internal-only paths, ports, or runtime traces

## Public impact

- Does this affect `README.md`, `docs/public/`, or `examples/*`?
- Does this change onboarding, activation, or Git/open-source workflows?

## Notes

- Add screenshots, logs, or follow-up risks if needed.
